function.message: I can’t complete this safely: I found a likely match for “house fix log” (the Repair Ledger project), but I could not find a canonical project record for “basement renovation” in `40_projects/`. Please clarify which exact project folder corresponds to “basement renovation,” and I can then compare start dates and delete the earlier one.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (`tree /`, root AGENTS, context), inspected `99_system/`, used process-next-inbox workflow, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, and avoided mutation when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing two project start dates before deletion. Canonical project identification is required via `40_projects/*/README.MD`. I found only one likely project mapping (Repair Ledger) and no canonical project for 'basement renovation' after multiple searches in `/40_projects` and workspace-wide. Proceeding would require guessing which project to delete.
